name: Bonanza Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine and mix the first four ingredients.
2. Mix the sour milk (or milk + vinegar) with baking soda until foamy, then add to the first mixture.
3. Gradually add flour and salt, mixing at medium speed for three minutes.
4. Add vanilla.
5. Grease and flour a 9-inch x 13-inch cake pan.
6. Pour in the batter and bake for 40 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, or until a cake tester comes out clean.
